name: Thaire Life Assurance Public Company Limited
summary: Thaire Life Assurance Public Company Limited provides life reinsurance solutions to various life insurance companies in Thailand. The company operates in two segments, Conventional Products and Non-Conventional Products. It offers ordinary, group, and credit and mortgage term insurance, as well as personal accident, health, accidental riders, etc. insurance products under treaties and facultative basis. Thaire Life Assurance Public Company Limited was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
